scripts.build:browser: esbuild src/browser/app.ts src/browser/game-entry.ts src/browser/deck-editor-entry.ts --bundle --outdir=public --entry-names=[name] --format=iife --platform=browser && mv public/app.js public/bundle.js && mv public/game-entry.js public/game-bundle.js && mv public/deck-editor-entry.js public/deck-editor-bundle.js
scripts.start: npm run build:browser && npx tsx src/server.ts
scripts.dev: nodemon --watch src --watch ../shared/src --watch public --ext ts,json,html,css,js --ignore public/bundle.js --ignore public/game-bundle.js --ignore public/deck-editor-bundle.js --exec 'npm run build:browser && npx tsx src/server.ts --dev'
